AdminHeader.uploadDesc: Supports single, LivePhoto, and batch uploads.
AdminHeader.listDesc: Supports filtering, sorting, batch actions, and quick editing.
AdminHeader.albumDesc: Create, edit, and organize album display order.
AdminHeader.tagsDesc: Manage primary/secondary tags for frontend filtering and backend archival.
AdminHeader.storagesDesc: Configure object storage services and access parameters.
AdminHeader.preferencesDesc: Manage site info, display options, RSS, and About page configuration.
AdminHeader.authenticatorDesc: Enable or disable TOTP verification to strengthen admin security.
AdminHeader.preferencesHint: Finish basic info and display settings first, then configure the About section.

Config.region: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Region, e.g., oss-cn-hongkong
Config.endpoint: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Endpoint, e.g., oss-cn-hongkong.aliyuncs.com
Config.bucket: Aliyun OSS / AWS S3 Bucket name, e.g., xphotos
Config.storage_folder: Storage folder (S3), strict format, e.g., xphotos or xphotos/images, leave empty or / for root path
Config.force_path_style: Whether to force the client to use path-based addressing for buckets.
Config.s3_cdn: Whether to enable S3 CDN mode, the path will return the cdn address.
Config.s3_direct_download: Whether to enable S3 direct link download mode.
Config.r2_direct_download: Whether to enable R2 direct link download mode.
Config.r2_storage_folder: Storage folder (Cloudflare R2). Strict format (e.g., xphotos or xphotos/images). Use '/' or leave blank for root path
Config.awsS3PathStyleTip: AWS S3 typically uses virtual-host style, it is recommended to set force_path_style to false
Config.cos_endpoint: Tencent COS Endpoint (S3 compatible), e.g.: https://cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com
Config.cos_bucket: Tencent COS Bucket (usually contains AppId suffix), e.g.: example-1250000000
Config.cos_storage_folder: Storage Folder (COS), strict format, e.g.: xphotos or xphotos/images, fill / or leave empty for root path
Config.cos_force_path_style: Whether to force the client to use path-style addressing for the bucket
Config.cos_cdn: Whether to enable COS CDN mode, paths will return CDN addresses
Config.cos_direct_download: Whether to enable COS direct link download mode
Config.storageFolderTooltip: Leave empty for root, no leading/trailing slashes
Config.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (including protocol, e.g., https://)

TagManager.title: Tag Management
TagManager.selectPrimaryTag: Please select a primary tag on the left
TagManager.targetPrimaryPlaceholder: Select target primary tag (leave empty to upgrade to primary tag)
TagManager.moveHint: Hint: Leave empty to upgrade to primary tag; select a target primary tag to move under it as a secondary tag. Image tag associations will be synced automatically.
TagManager.hasChildTagsWarning: Notice: This tag has {count} child tags, which will be moved together
TagManager.isSecondaryTagHint: Hint: This is a secondary tag, you can upgrade it to a primary tag or move it under another primary tag
TagManager.inputPrimaryTagName: Please enter a primary tag name
TagManager.inputSecondaryTagName: Please enter a secondary tag name
TagManager.selectPrimaryCategoryFirst: Please select a primary category first
TagManager.deleteWithChildrenSuccess: Primary tag and its children deleted
TagManager.moveSuccess: Moved successfully, image tag associations synced automatically
TagManager.cannotEditNoRecord: Cannot edit: no corresponding parent tag record
TagManager.cannotMoveNoRecord: Cannot move: no corresponding tag record
TagManager.confirmDeletePrimary: Are you sure you want to delete this primary tag?
TagManager.confirmDeletePrimaryWithChildren: Deleting this primary tag will also delete all its secondary tags. Are you sure?
TagManager.confirmDeleteUncategorized: Are you sure you want to delete all uncategorized tags?
TagManager.confirmDeleteTag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?
TagManager.checkComplete: Check complete: Checked {total} images, fixed {fixed} images, found {invalid} invalid associations
TagManager.cleanupOrphanDescription: Orphan tags are tags that have no image associations. They will be deleted after cleanup.
TagManager.cleanupOrphanWarning: Warning: This operation will permanently delete these tags. Please proceed with caution.
TagManager.renameSyncSuccess: Tag rename sync successful! Updated labels field for {images} images, updated category field for {tags} child tags
